summary: Iteration 85 - Wealth Command Improvements Testing. All backend tests passed (23/23). Verified ScenarioModelling clean card design, KnowledgeGraphDashboard has 5 tabs (no Graph tab), TransactionModeler has 7 tabs including Bonds and Hybrids, and Client Portal API returns all asset types.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ScenarioModelling page: Clean card design with light backgrounds, no dark gradients
✅ ScenarioModelling tabs: Simple text-only tabs (Goals, Assets, Scenario, Projection) - no icons
✅ KnowledgeGraphDashboard: Has exactly 5 tabs (Insights, Overview, Actions, Risks, Opportunities) - NO Graph tab
✅ TransactionModeler: Has all 7 tabs (Property, Fund, Stock, ETF, Bonds, Hybrids, Crypto)
✅ TransactionModeler Bonds tab: Code has bond_type, yield_to_maturity, maturity_years, credit_rating fields
✅ TransactionModeler Hybrids tab: Code has margin_over_bbsw, running_yield calculation
✅ Client Portal /api/client-portal/portfolios/portal_001: Returns portfolios with stocks, etfs, funds, bonds, hybrids, crypto, cash
✅ Client Portal net_worth breakdown: Includes stocks, etfs, managed_funds, bonds, hybrids, crypto, cash
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 verified all Wealth Command improvements: 1) ScenarioModelling page has clean card design without dark gradients and simple tabs without icons, 2) KnowledgeGraphDashboard has 5 tabs (Insights, Overview, Actions, Risks, Opportunities) - Graph tab was removed as requested, 3) TransactionModeler has 7 tabs including Bonds and Hybrids with proper form fields (bond_type, yield_to_maturity, maturity_years, credit_rating for Bonds; margin_over_bbsw, running_yield for Hybrids), 4) Client Portal API returns portfolios with all asset types (stocks, funds, bonds, hybrids, crypto, cash) and net_worth breakdown includes all asset categories.

transaction_modeler_bonds_fields.verification: Code verified: bond_type, yield_to_maturity, maturity_years, credit_rating fields present

transaction_modeler_hybrids_fields.verification: Code verified: margin_over_bbsw, running_yield calculation present

client_portal_all_assets.verification: Portfolios include stocks, etfs, funds, bonds, hybrids, crypto, cash holdings
